info.name: LMS — Attendance (v1)
info.description:
Attendance APIs for the student/teacher app.

- **Self view** (`/attendance/my`) is role-aware: a student sees their own day-wise attendance, a teacher sees theirs. Each day's `status` is one of `present` | `absent` | `holiday` | `not_marked` | `upcoming`. `not_marked` = a past/today date with no record; `upcoming` = a future date in the month (shown as a dash in the app).
- **Marking** is for teachers and limited to the **last 3 working days**. Sundays are auto-holidays — they are skipped from the window and cannot be marked. Out-of-window dates (and Sundays) return **403**.
- `get-student-for-attendance` returns the teacher's assigned classes with each student's current status for a date; `POST /attendance` bulk-submits; `POST /attendance/mark-holiday` marks a whole class+section as holiday.

Student attendance is stored as a tinyint (`status`: 0=absent, 1=present, 4=holiday). The teacher app marks per-student Present/Absent/Holiday and submits the codes via `POST /attendance`.

Auth: Sanctum bearer token in `authToken`.

query.description: YYYY-MM. Defaults to the current month if omitted/invalid.

request.description:
Self attendance for the authenticated user (role auto-detected).

Returns `month`, `role`, `days[] { date, day, status }` and a `summary` with `total_days`, `working_days`, `present_days`, `absent_days`, `holiday_days`, `not_marked_days`, `present_percentage`.

`status` values:
- `present` / `absent` — a recorded attendance row
- `holiday` — a Sunday (auto-holiday) or a date the teacher marked as holiday (status code 4)
- `not_marked` — a past/today date that was never marked
- `upcoming` — a future date in the month (render as a dash)

Sundays are always returned as `holiday` regardless of any stored record.

All classes assigned to the authenticated teacher, with each class's students and their current attendance for `date` (defaults to today).

Response: `teacher_info`, `date`, `classes[] { assignment_id, class_info, total_students, students[] { student_id, roll_no, full_name, photo, attendance { status, db_status, remarks } } }`, and a `summary`.

**404** if no teacher profile or no assigned classes.

Bulk insert/update student attendance for `attendance_date`.

Each item: `student_detail_id` (required, must exist), `status` (required — tinyint code: `0`=absent, `1`=present, `4`=holiday; legacy booleans true/false are still accepted and normalised to 1/0), `remarks` (optional).

`attendance_date` must be within the **last 3 working days** (Sundays excluded), else **403**.

Returns `processed_count`, a daily `summary`, and per-record `details` (with the stored integer `status`).

Marks an entire class+section as **holiday** for `date` (every student's attendance row is set to status code 4).

Body: `date` (required, within the last 3 working days (Sundays excluded)), `standard_id` (required), `section_id` (optional — omit for classes without sections).

The teacher must be assigned to the class (**403** otherwise). A Sunday, or a `date` outside the last 3 working days → **403**. Returns `{ date, standard_id, section_id, marked_students }`.
Present/absent summary for the teacher's classes on `date`. Optionally pass `standard_id` + `section_id` to scope to one class (must be assigned to the teacher, else **403**).
The authenticated teacher's own attendance status for today, including `can_edit` (editable within 24h of marking).

Paginated history of the authenticated teacher's own attendance with statistics (current month / last 30 days / overall). Optional filters: `month`, `year`, `date`, `status` (present|absent|late|half_day), `per_page`.
